questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Genea and/or Adora Fertility are close competitors to Care Fertility and if there are not many alternatives.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Genea, Adora Fertility and/or Care Fertility.
